series_metadata.series_description: Minutes generated from official meetings that document the business conducted during the meeting relating to orders, policy/procedures, directives, discussion, decisions and actions. (Examples: Commission Meetings and other committee, board, group or council meetings.)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two (2) state fiscal years following fiscal year created. when no longer of administrative value and State Archives completes historic review. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: two (2) state fiscal years following fiscal year created. when no longer of administrative value and State Archives completes historic review. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records
